config.script:
#include "50100" #include "50126"
sub plug_podstawowe(byref pContainer,byval idobj)
dim pUrzadzenie : set pUrzadzenie = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5KLIENT_OBIEKT,idobj)
dim pPlugInTable : set pPlugInTable = pContainer.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_TABLE,-1) pPlugInTable.border = 0
dim pTB : set pTB = doc_.afc.new_tb(nothing).attach(pPlugInTable)
pTB.newrow.newcell.addtext("Nazwa").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtext pUrzadzenie.klob_strNazwa
pTB.newrow.newcell.addtext("Indeks").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtext pUrzadzenie.klob_strIndeks
pTB.newrow.newcell.addtext("Obecny właściciel").element.bold = true if not pUrzadzenie.klob_pKlient is nothing then set pTB.newcell.addtext(pUrzadzenie.klob_pKlient.text).element.hli = _ doc_.createhlistr("varFunctionHLI='std_openform_field_hli' vs1='klob_pKlient'") else pTB.newcell.addtext "<brak>" end if
pTB.newrow.newcell.addtext("Serwisant").element.bold = true if not pUrzadzenie.klob_pPracownik is nothing then set pTB.newcell.addtext( pUrzadzenie.klob_pPracownik.text).element.hli = _ doc_.createhlistr("varFunctionHLI='std_openform_field_hli' vs1='klob_pPracownik'") else pTB.newcell.addtext "<brak>" end if
end sub
sub plug_naprawy(byref pContainer,byval idobj)
dim pUrzadzenie : set pUrzadzenie = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5KLIENT_OBIEKT,idobj)
dim where:where = " pZadanie in (select idobj from n5zadanie where zad_pKLOB = "+cstr(idobj)+")" dim cursor:set cursor = trans_.createrawcursor(TYPEID_N5ZAMOWIENIE , where , "dDataWyst desc" , "")
dim pPlugInTable : set pPlugInTable = pContainer.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_TABLE,-1) pPlugInTable.border = 0 dim pTB : set pTB = doc_.afc.new_tb(nothing).attach(pPlugInTable)
pTB.newrow pTB.row.styleitem = STYLE_TABLE_HEADER pTB.row.border = 0 pTB.newcell.addtext("Numer dok.").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtext("Data wyst.").element.bold = true
dim pZlec dim iter:iter = 0
for each pZlec in cursor pTB.newrow pTB.newcell.addtexthli pZlec.text , doc_.createhlistr("varFunctionHLI='std_openform_object_hli' vn1='"+cstr(pZlec.type)+"' vn2='"+cstr(pZlec.idobj)+"'") pTB.cell.styleitem = STYLE_OPTION_PAD pTB.newcell.addtext(trans_.afc.display.fulldate(pZlec.dDataWyst)) next
end sub
sub plug_protokoly(byref pContainer,byval idobj)
DEBUG_MESSAGE(cstr(idobj))
dim pUrzadzenie : set pUrzadzenie = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5KLIENT_OBIEKT,idobj)
dim where:where = " zad_pKLOB = " + cstr(idobj) dim cursor:set cursor = trans_.createrawcursor(TYPEID_N5ZADANIE , where , "dDataZlec desc" , "")
dim pPlugInTable : set pPlugInTable = pContainer.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_TABLE,-1) pPlugInTable.border = 0 dim pTB : set pTB = doc_.afc.new_tb(nothing).attach(pPlugInTable)
pTB.newrow pTB.row.styleitem = STYLE_TABLE_HEADER pTB.row.border = 0 pTB.newcell.addtext("Data wyst.").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtext("Klient").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtext("Temat").element.bold = true
dim pZadanie dim iter:iter = 0
for each pZadanie in cursor pTB.newrow pTB.newcell.addtext(trans_.afc.display.fulldate(pZadanie.dDataZlec)) pTB.newcell.addtexthli pZadanie.pKlient.text , doc_.createhlistr("varFunctionHLI='std_openform_object_hli' vn1='"+cstr(pZadanie.pKlient.type)+"' vn2='"+cstr(pZadanie.pKlient.idobj)+"'") pTB.newcell.addtexthli pZadanie.text , doc_.createhlistr( doc_.afc.convert.formatter(" OPEN_FORM_PROXY_HLI_USAGE(%1,%2,USAGE_ZADANIE_ZLECSERWIS) ") _ .add(cstr(pZadanie.type)).add(cstr(pZadanie.idobj)).done()) pTB.cell.styleitem = STYLE_OPTION_PAD next
end sub
sub plug_zakupy(byref pContainer,byval idobj)
dim createQuery : createQuery = "select * from " + vbNewLine +_ "( " + vbNewLine +_ "select " + vbNewLine +_ "10129 as dokument_type, " + vbNewLine +_ "p_strnrdok as dokument_numer " + vbNewLine +_ ",p_idobj as dokument_idobj " + vbNewLine +_ ",p_ddatawyst as dokument_data " + vbNewLine +_ ",n5produkt.strNazwa as towar_nazwa " + vbNewLine +_ ",n5produkt.idobj as towar_idobj " + vbNewLine +_ ",n5jednostka.nDokladnosc as towar_dokladnosc " + vbNewLine +_ ",n5jednostka.strSkrot as towar_jm " + vbNewLine +_ ",c_curiloscopak as pozycja_ilosc " + vbNewLine +_ ",c_curwartbrutto as pozycja_wartosc " + vbNewLine +_ "from vlist_n5sprzedaz_listPozycje " + vbNewLine +_ "inner join n5produkt on (n5produkt.idobj = vlist_n5sprzedaz_listPozycje.c_pprodukt ) " + vbNewLine +_ "inner join dbo.n5jednostka on (n5jednostka.idobj = n5produkt.pJednostkaEwid) " + vbNewLine +_ "where vlist_n5sprzedaz_listPozycje.c_psprzed_pklob = " + Cstr(idobj) + " and " + vbNewLine +_ "p_idobj not in (select pPopSprzed from n5sprzedaz) " + vbNewLine +_ "union " + vbNewLine +_ "select " + vbNewLine +_ "10162 as dokument_type, " + vbNewLine +_ "max(dokument_numer), " + vbNewLine +_ "max(dokument_idobj), " + vbNewLine +_ "max(dokument_data), " + vbNewLine +_ "max(towar_nazwa), " + vbNewLine +_ "max(towar_idobj), " + vbNewLine +_ "max(towar_dokladnosc), " + vbNewLine +_ "max(towar_jm), " + vbNewLine +_ "sum(pozycja_ilosc), " + vbNewLine +_ "-1 * sum(pozycja_ilosc) * max(pozycja_cena) " + vbNewLine +_ "from " + vbNewLine +_ "( " + vbNewLine +_ "select " + vbNewLine +_ "case p_pdokmag when 0 then p_strnrdok else '' end as dokument_numer , " + vbNewLine +_ "case p_pdokmag when 0 then p_idobj else p_pdokmag end as dokument_idobj , " + vbNewLine +_ "p_ddatawyst as dokument_data, " + vbNewLine +_ "n5produkt.strNazwa as towar_nazwa , " + vbNewLine +_ "n5produkt.idobj as towar_idobj , " + vbNewLine +_ "n5jednostka.nDokladnosc as towar_dokladnosc , " + vbNewLine +_ "n5jednostka.strSkrot as towar_jm , " + vbNewLine +_ "case p_pdokmag when 0 then c_curiloscopak else -1*c_curiloscopak end as pozycja_ilosc, " + vbNewLine +_ "c_curcenamag as pozycja_cena " + vbNewLine +_ "from dbo.vlist_n5dokmag_listPozycje " + vbNewLine +_ "inner join n5produkt on (n5produkt.idobj = vlist_n5dokmag_listPozycje.c_pprodukt ) " + vbNewLine +_ "inner join dbo.n5jednostka on (n5jednostka.idobj = n5produkt.pJednostkaEwid) " + vbNewLine +_ "where vlist_n5dokmag_listPozycje.c_pdm_pobiektklienta = " + Cstr(idobj) + vbNewLine +_ ") tmp " + vbNewLine +_ "group by dokument_idobj " + vbNewLine +_ ") tmp2 " + vbNewLine +_ "order by dokument_data desc "
dim pPlugInTable : set pPlugInTable = pContainer.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_TABLE,-1) pPlugInTable.border = 0 dim pTB : set pTB = doc_.afc.new_tb(nothing).attach(pPlugInTable)
pTB.newrow pTB.row.styleitem = STYLE_TABLE_HEADER pTB.row.border = 0 pTB.newcell.addtext("Numer dokumentu").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtext("Data wystawienia").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtext("Materiał").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtext("Ilość").element.bold = true pTB.cell.align = ALIGN_RIGHT pTB.newcell.addtext("Wartość").element.bold = true pTB.cell.align = ALIGN_RIGHT
dim RS:set RS=trans_.createadors(createQuery)
dim suma:suma = 0
while not RS.eof dim typeid: typeid = cstr(RS("dokument_type").value) dim id: id = cstr(RS("dokument_idobj").value) dim doknr: doknr = cstr(RS("dokument_numer").value) pTB.newrow pTB.newcell.addtexthli doknr , doc_.createhlistr("varFunctionHLI='std_openform_object_hli' vn1='"+cstr(typeid)+"' vn2='"+cstr(id)+"'") pTB.newcell.addtext(trans_.afc.display.fulldate(cstr(RS("dokument_data").value))) pTB.newcell.addtexthli cstr(RS("towar_nazwa").value) , doc_.createhlistr( doc_.afc.convert.formatter(" OPEN_FORM_PROXY_HLI_USAGE(%1,%2,USAGE_EDIT) ") _ .add(cstr(10131)).add(cstr(RS("towar_idobj").value)).done())
pTB.newcell.addtext(trans_.afc.display.quantity( ccur(RS("pozycja_ilosc").value), cstr(RS("towar_jm").value), cint(RS("towar_dokladnosc").value)-1)).cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT pTB.newcell.addtext(trans_.afc.display.money(ccur(RS("pozycja_wartosc").value),"")).cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT
suma = suma + ccur(RS("pozycja_wartosc").value)
'dim klient_nazwa:klient_nazwa = cstr(oRecordset("klient_nazwa").value) 'dim sprzedaz_data:sprzedaz_data = cdate(oRecordset("sprzedaz_data").value) RS.movenext wend
pTB.newrow pTB.row.styleitem = STYLE_TABLE_HEADER pTB.row.border = 0 pTB.newcell.addtext("").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtext("").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtext("").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtext("").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtext(trans_.afc.display.money(suma,"")).element.bold = true pTB.cell.align = ALIGN_RIGHT
end sub
sub plug_wlasciciele(byref pContainer,byval idobj)
dim pPlugInTable : set pPlugInTable = pContainer.addnew(CTRL_TYPE_TABLE,-1) pPlugInTable.border = 0 dim pTB : set pTB = doc_.afc.new_tb(nothing).attach(pPlugInTable)
pTB.newrow pTB.row.styleitem = STYLE_TABLE_HEADER pTB.row.border = 0 pTB.newcell.addtext("Klient").element.bold = true pTB.newcell.addtext("Data zmiany").element.bold = true
dim sql:sql = _ " select distinct * from (" +_ " select isnull(p_pklient,0) as klient_id " +_ " ,isnull(n5klient.strNazwa,'') as klient_nazwa " +_ " ,isnull(p_ddatawyst,{d '1899-12-31'}) as sprzedaz_data " +_ " ,isnull(p_idobj,0) as sprzedaz_id " +_ " ,isnull(p_strnrdok,'') as sprzedaz_numer, p_ddatawyst " +_ " from dbo.n5klient_obiekt " +_ " inner join dbo.vlist_n5sprzedaz_listPozycje on (c_psprzed_pklob = dbo.n5klient_obiekt.idobj) " +_ " inner join n5klient on (p_pklient = n5klient.idobj) " +_ " where dbo.n5klient_obiekt.IdObj = " + CStr(idobj) + ") tmp " +_ " order by tmp.p_ddatawyst desc "
dim oRecordset:set oRecordset=trans_.createadors(sql) while not oRecordset.eof dim klient_id:klient_id = cint(oRecordset("klient_id").value) dim klient_nazwa:klient_nazwa = cstr(oRecordset("klient_nazwa").value) dim sprzedaz_data:sprzedaz_data = cdate(oRecordset("sprzedaz_data").value) generate_owner_row klient_id , klient_nazwa , sprzedaz_data , pTB oRecordset.movenext wend
end sub
public sub generate_owner_row(byval klient_id , byval klient_nazwa , byval sprzedaz_data , byref pTB) pTB.newrow pTB.newcell.addtexthli klient_nazwa , doc_.createhlistr( doc_.afc.convert.formatter(" OPEN_FORM_PROXY_HLI_USAGE(%1,%2,USAGE_VIEW) ") _ .add(cstr(10108)).add(cstr(klient_id)).done()) pTB.newcell.addtext(trans_.afc.display.fulldate(sprzedaz_data)) 'pTB.cell.styleitem = STYLE_OPTION_PAD end sub
